subject: FW: ALF GPS
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Saturday, December 29, 2007 10:07 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: ALF GPS

Pls tell je that I have just arrived on stt and that I will be around
the usvi/bvi until 1/1. I would also like to know if he would like to
attend the new year's eve celebration at yacht haven and, if so, how
many seats he needs. Thx.
